overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a Viking warrior traversing a snowy mountain landscape at night. The character moves steadily from a snowy ridge through vegetated terrain toward a cliff edge overlooking the ocean, with stars visible in the clear night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain slope with distant cliff views

agents.ego_description: Viking warrior walking steadily up a snowy incline with a round shield on back and weapons sheathed

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with visible footprints and texture
steep rock formation dropping down to the ocean
dark water visible far below the cliff edge
sparse evergreen trees dotting the snowy hillside
mountain range visible in the background under starlight

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a snowy mountain slope at night, with the Viking character walking away from the camera. To the left, a steep cliff drops down to a distant ocean, while scattered pine trees stand on the right. The terrain is open and exposed under a clear starry sky.

events.description: character briefly slows or stops before continuing forward movement

agents.ego_description: traversing through patches of tall grass and frost-covered bushes on the snow

entered.detail: snow-covered shrubs and tall grass patches emerging from the snow
prominent boulder sitting on the hillside ahead

segments.scene_description: The terrain transitions to a plateau with moderate vegetation including frosted bushes and tall grass patches. The character continues moving forward, passing a large rock formation. The ocean remains visible to the left but appears closer as the path curves toward the cliff edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliff edge path at night

events.description: terrain shifts to narrow cliff edge path with steep drop to ocean below

agents.ego_description: carefully walking along the narrow cliff edge path with the ocean visible far below to the left

entered.detail: narrow trail along the edge of the cliff with deep snow
tall frozen grass growing along the cliff edge
clear night sky filled with visible stars and faint clouds

segments.scene_description: The final segment follows the narrow cliff edge path with a steep drop to the ocean on the left. The character moves steadily along the snow-covered trail, with tall grass tufts on the right and a magnificent starry sky overhead. The ocean stretches out to the horizon under the moonlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a snowy mountain slope that gradually narrows into a precarious cliffside path overlooking the ocean. It begins with the Viking character walking away from the camera across an open, exposed ridge flanked by scattered pine trees and a distant coastline under a clear starry sky. As the character moves forward, the terrain shifts into a plateau of frosted bushes and tall grass, passing a large rock formation while the ocean draws closer to the left. The scene then tightens as the path curves toward the very edge of the cliff, following the character along a narrow, snow-covered trail. Finally, the camera tracks the steady progress along this precipice, where the land drops steeply into a moonlit ocean that stretches toward the horizon.
